Home / Services / Deck Staining and Sealing

Deck Staining and Sealing

Protect and beautify your deck with professional staining and sealing services.

Protect your investment and enhance the natural beauty of your deck with Deck the House's professional staining and sealing services. We offer a range of high-quality stains and sealants specifically designed to withstand San Antonio's climate, protecting your deck from sun damage, moisture, and decay. Our experienced team carefully prepares the deck surface, ensuring proper adhesion and a long-lasting finish. We offer a variety of stain colors to complement your home and personal style. Regular staining and sealing not only enhance the appearance of your deck but also extend its lifespan, preventing costly repairs down the road. Deck the House uses environmentally friendly products whenever possible, minimizing our impact on the environment while providing superior protection for your deck. We understand the importance of a well-maintained deck for your enjoyment and property value, and we are committed to providing exceptional service and lasting results.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Cleaning - Thoroughly clean the deck surface to remove dirt, mildew, and old finishes.
  2. 02 Step 2: Preparation - Sand and repair any damaged areas to ensure a smooth and even surface.
  3. 03 Step 3: Staining/Sealing - Apply high-quality stain or sealant according to manufacturer instructions.
  4. 04 Step 4: Final Inspection - Ensure a consistent and durable finish for long-lasting protection.

Benefits

  • Protection from sun damage and moisture
  • Enhanced aesthetic appeal
  • Extended deck lifespan
  • Increased property value

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I stain and seal my deck?

We recommend staining and sealing your deck every 1-3 years, depending on the type of wood and exposure to the elements.

What type of stain is best for my deck?

The best type of stain depends on the type of wood and your desired look. We can help you choose the right stain for your deck.

Do you offer a warranty on your staining and sealing services?

Yes, we offer a warranty on our staining and sealing services to ensure your satisfaction.

Get a Free Estimate
